infrastructure_built.gpu_env: conda-forge fe_gpu (glibc-2.17 compatible, CUDA 11.8) runs on g-nodes ~50x CPU
infrastructure_built.phonon_gamma_eigenvectors: 1,534 materials via Petretto DDB + ABINIT/anaddb (FULLY LOCAL, 0 errors) - bypasses flaky MP API

key_finding: Direct soft-mode EIGENVECTOR prediction is ILL-POSED: 72% of materials have (near-)degenerate softest optical modes, so the single-eigenvector target is arbitrary within the degenerate subspace -> all methods plateau near random regardless of data/pretraining.
principled_fix: Predict the dynamical matrix (Hessian, equivariant rank-2, degeneracy-free); soft mode = its lowest eigenpair. Data already in hand (1534 DDBs give full force constants).
standalone_publishable: Equivariant Born-charge -> quantum-free spontaneous polarization (Z* R2=0.95) + the polarization-quantum insight
